title: Consumer finance disclosure Q&A groundedness
description: Checks that an assistant's answer about a credit card / loan disclosure cites only real disclosure sections and only states rates and fees that match the extracted disclosure evidence.

candidate_shape.conclusion: free-text answer shown to the end user
candidate_shape.cited_evidence: list of disclosure/section ids the answer relied on
candidate_shape.claims: list of {subject, value} facts the answer asserts

evidence_shape.documents: list of {id, title, text} disclosure sections
evidence_shape.facts: list of {id, subject, value} extracted terms (APR, fees, limits)
